basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Technical Superintendent, Research Administrative Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore)
basic_details.post_name: Project Administrative Assistant, Research Administrative Assistant (Technology & IPR), Technical Superintendent (Procurement)
basic_details.short_information: IIT Indore is recruiting 04 contractual positions (Project Admin Assistant – 02, Research Admin Assistant – 01, Technical Superintendent – 01) with Bachelor’s degree qualification. Walk-in Date: 10 July 2026.

important_dates.venue: Board Room, Abhinandan Bhavan, 8th Floor, IIT Indore

qualification.details: Desirable Qualifications (for all posts): Experience in academic institutions, accounts/audit/procurement/IPR, research project management, etc.

selection_process: Candidates must fill the online form and attend Walk-in Interview on 10 July 2026. Bring updated CV
and passport-size photograph. Selection based on interview performance and relevant experience. Appointment is purely temporary (initially 1 year
how_to_apply: Fill the online application form: https://forms.gle/tYS2xcUtpRVk1PVW9
Attend Walk-in Interview on 10 July 2026 at 10:00 AM.
Bring all required documents to the venue.
important_instructions: Appointment is purely temporary and contractual. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Selected candidates must join immediately. IIT Indore reserves the right to cancel or not fill any post. Remuneration is taxable; no additional allowances like Bonus, Gratuity, etc.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Indore is recruiting 04 contractual positions (Project Admin Assistant – 02, Research Admin Assistant – 01, Technical Superintendent – 01) with Bachelor’s degree qualification. Walk-in Date: 10 July 2026.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_indore_ii: Project Administrative Assistant, Research Administrative Assistant (Technology & IPR), Technical Superintendent (Procurement)

rows.date: Board Room, Abhinandan Bhavan, 8th Floor, IIT Indore

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Desirable Qualifications (for all posts): Experience in academic institutions, accounts/audit/procurement/IPR, research project management, etc.

rows.essential_qualifications_experience: Bachelor’s Degree + Knowledge of Computer Operations + Minimum 02 years relevant experience
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering/Science
Bachelor’s Degree + Knowledge of Computer Operations + Minimum 02 years relevant experience

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Candidates must fill the online form and attend Walk-in Interview on 10 July 2026. Bring updated CV, original certificates, self-attested copies, and passport-size photograph. Selection based on interview performance and relevant experience. Appointment is purely temporary (initially 1 year, extendable based on performance).

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Indore Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Fill the online application form: https://forms.gle/tYS2xcUtpRVk1PVW9 Attend Walk-in Interview on 10 July 2026 at 10:00 AM. Bring all required documents to the venue.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: Appointment is purely temporary and contractual. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Selected candidates must join immediately. IIT Indore reserves the right to cancel or not fill any post. Remuneration is taxable; no additional allowances like Bonus, Gratuity, etc.

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in interview date for IIT Indore R&D Staff 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 10 July 2026 at 10:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in IIT Indore R&D Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Total 04 contractual posts are announced.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Administrative Assistant at IIT Indore?
faq.answer: Consolidated pay is ₹25,000 – ₹30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility for Research Administrative Assistant (Technology & IPR) at IIT Indore?
faq.answer: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering/Science with desirable experience in IPR and technology commercialization.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for IIT Indore R&D Staff positions?
faq.answer: Upper age limit is 35 years for all posts.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for IIT Indore Walk-in Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Fill the Google form and attend walk-in interview on 10 July 2026 with all documents.

faq.question: Q7. What is the pay for Technical Superintendent (Procurement) at IIT Indore?
faq.answer: Consolidated remuneration is ₹40,000 – ₹45,000 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is experience mandatory for IIT Indore Administrative Assistant posts?
faq.answer: Yes, minimum 02 years of relevant experience is required for Project Administrative Assistant and Technical Superintendent posts.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for IIT Indore R&D Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Updated CV, original certificates, self-attested copies, and recent passport-size photograph.

faq.question: Q10. Is the IIT Indore R&D Staff appointment permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely temporary/contractual for initially 1 year, extendable based on performance.
